about.title: Summary
about.text: I am an agile fullstack consultant passionate about open source frontend and backend technologies. I like to develop software using cloud solutions, all in line with the Devops movement.
about.textCdi: Agile fullstack engineer with 20 years of experience, I design robust cloud-native applications with a DevOps culture and craftsmanship mindset, using open source frontend and backend stacks.

educationLevel.title: Education Level
educationLevel.effectiveLevelDetail: Backed by 20 years of professional experience
educationLevel.diplomaDetail: Professional Bachelor in Computer Science and Software Systems

78726111.description: I like to develop reusable components in a clustered environment using concepts like microservices, robustness, observability, clean code.
78726111.descriptionCdi: I design reusable components in clustered environments applying microservices, robustness, observability and clean code principles.

78726113.description: I know how to use my multiple experiences of agility in the service of a team in order to achieve a product close to the need with a software craftsmanship philosophy.
78726113.descriptionCdi: Drawing on years of agile practice, I guide teams toward delivering the right product through software craftsmanship and continuous improvement.

78855347.description: I want to collaborate with operational teams by practicing continuous deployment and thus produce value for the company by reducing organizational friction.
78855347.descriptionCdi: I practice continuous deployment daily to ship value fast, reducing friction between development and production teams.

jpb-systeme.descriptionShort: Full-stack development on Keyvibe, Keyprod's industrial IoT hardware product

bullets.text: Keyvibe – Developed key features for industrial IoT solution
Designed and implemented a multi-threshold production detection system on Raspberry Pi 3 & 4, leveraging Python and Node.js to monitor machine operational states in real time.
Fully integrated Ethernet connectivity, configuring DHCPD and enabling MQTT communication to AWS IoT Core & AWS Lambda, ensuring reliable, low-latency, and scalable data transfer.
